extension_name.description: Name of the extension shown in the toolbar tooltip and in chrome://extensions.

extension_description.message: NOAIS (No Artificial Intelligence Slop) - detect, mask, and disable AI-generated content on the web.
extension_description.description: Long description shown on the extension's store listing.

popup_title.description: Heading at the top of the popup.

popup_subtitle.description: Subheading at the top of the popup.

popup_master_toggle_on.description: Status label when the master toggle is on.

popup_master_toggle_off.description: Status label when the master toggle is off.

popup_score_label.description: Label above the score readout in the popup.

popup_phrases_label.description: Label above the AI phrase count in the popup.

popup_site_label.description: Label above the per-site toggle in the popup.

popup_tab_label.description: Label above the per-tab toggle in the popup (v1.1).

popup_stats_label.description: Label above the per-page stats section in the popup (v1.1).

popup_stats_scanned.description: Suffix shown after the scanned-element count in the popup stats section.

popup_stats_likely.description: Suffix shown after the likely-AI count in the popup stats section.

popup_stats_high.description: Suffix shown after the very-high count in the popup stats section.

popup_why_link.description: Footer link in the popup that opens the side panel with the score breakdown.

popup_open_settings.description: Footer link in the popup that opens the full options page.

popup_active.description: Status text in the popup when NOAIS is enabled (v1.1).

popup_inactive.description: Status text in the popup when NOAIS is disabled (v1.1).

popup_toggle_site.description: Per-site disable button shown in the popup when the current site is one of the curated platforms (v1.1).

popup_enable_site.description: Per-site enable button shown in the popup when the current site is currently disabled (v1.1).

popup_settings_link.description: Footer link in the popup that opens the full options page (v1.1, replaces popup_open_settings for the inline link).

popup_words_analysed.description: Suffix shown after the word count (v1.1).

options_title.description: Heading at the top of the options page.

options_subtitle.description: Subheading at the top of the options page.

options_sensitivity_card_title.description: Title of the sensitivity card on the options page.

options_sensitivity_help.message: Scales the AI-likely score on every page. Default (100) shows raw scores. Move left to be more lenient, right to be stricter.
options_sensitivity_help.description: Helper text under the sensitivity card title.

options_sites_card_title.description: Title of the per-site card on the options page.

options_sites_help.message: NOAIS scans every page by default. Turn it off for sites where you don't want detection.
options_sites_help.description: Helper text under the per-site card title.

options_add_site_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the add-custom-site input.

options_sync_indicator_on.message: Settings sync across devices via your browser.
options_sync_indicator_on.description: Banner shown when chrome.storage.sync is available.

options_sync_indicator_off.message: Settings will not sync across devices (sync unavailable).
options_sync_indicator_off.description: Banner shown when chrome.storage.sync is unavailable.

options_band_off.description: Label shown next to the sensitivity slider when sensitivity is 0-9 (v1.1).

options_band_lenient.description: Label shown next to the sensitivity slider when sensitivity is 10-49 (v1.1).

options_band_default.description: Label shown next to the sensitivity slider when sensitivity is 50-89 (v1.1).

options_band_strict.description: Label shown next to the sensitivity slider when sensitivity is 90-100 (v1.1).

options_badge_curated.description: Badge on a site-list row for one of the 7 curated platforms (v1.1).

options_badge_custom.description: Badge on a site-list row for a user-added custom site (v1.1).

options_hard_mode_card_title.description: Title of the hard-mode sites card on the options page (v1.1).

options_hard_mode_help.message: On these sites, NOAIS dims and blurs suspected AI content instead of just adding a badge. Use the Settings page on a per-site basis to add or remove entries.
options_hard_mode_help.description: Helper text under the hard-mode card title.

options_hard_mode_empty.message: No hard-mode sites yet. Add one from the settings card above by checking 'Hard mode' for the site.
options_hard_mode_empty.description: Empty-state message shown when the hard-mode list is empty (v1.1).

options_hard_mode_remove.description: Label of the per-site hard-mode Remove button (v1.1).

options_hard_mode_on_short.description: Short label on the hard-mode toggle button when hard mode is active for the site.

options_hard_mode_off_short.description: Short label on the hard-mode toggle button when hard mode is off for the site.

options_saved.description: Toast shown when a setting has been persisted (v1.1).

options_close_link.description: Footer link that closes the options tab (v1.1).

welcome_title.description: Heading at the top of the welcome page (v1.1).

welcome_get_started.description: Primary button on the welcome page that opens the options.

welcome_take_tour.description: Secondary button on the welcome page that walks the user through the UI.

sidepanel_title.description: Heading at the top of the why side panel (v1.1).

sidepanel_score_label.description: Label above the score readout in the side panel.

sidepanel_metrics_label.description: Label above the per-metric breakdown in the side panel.

sidepanel_phrases_label.description: Label above the matched-phrases list in the side panel.

sidepanel_allowlist_button.description: Button in the side panel that adds the element to the per-element allowlist.

sidepanel_report_link.description: Footer link in the side panel that opens a GitHub issue template.

cmd_toggle_site.message: Toggle NOAIS for the current site
cmd_toggle_site.description: Description of the Ctrl+Shift+A keyboard shortcut shown in chrome://extensions/shortcuts.

page_counter_badge.description: Text shown on the page-counter widget (v1.1). $count$ is replaced with the per-page detection count.

tooltip_why.description: Link in the badge tooltip that opens the side panel.

tooltip_dont_show.description: Link in the badge tooltip that adds the element to the per-element allowlist.

why_panel_title.description: Title of the side panel that explains the per-page AI score.

why_panel_subtitle.message: A breakdown of how NOAIS reached its verdict

why_panel_score.description: Heading for the score region of the side panel.

why_panel_score_high.description: Score label when the AI score is 70 or above.

why_panel_score_mid.description: Score label when the AI score is 40-69.

why_panel_score_low.description: Score label when the AI score is 1-39.

why_panel_waiting.description: Default label shown in the score region before any analysis has been broadcast.

why_panel_breakdown.description: Heading for the per-signal breakdown of the score.

why_panel_breakdown_vocab.description: Label for the vocabulary entropy row in the breakdown.

why_panel_breakdown_perplexity.description: Label for the perplexity row in the breakdown.

why_panel_breakdown_burstiness.description: Label for the burstiness row in the breakdown.

why_panel_breakdown_hapax.description: Label for the hapax ratio row in the breakdown (v1.1.2).

why_panel_explain.description: Heading for the explainer section in the side panel.

why_panel_explain_body.message: NOAIS analyses every text node on the page and combines four signals — type-token ratio, Shannon entropy, burstiness, and hapax ratio — into a single 0-100 score. Higher means more likely to be AI-generated. Everything runs locally in your browser; no text ever leaves your device.

why_panel_privacy.description: Heading for the privacy section in the side panel.

why_panel_privacy_body.message: NOAIS never makes a network call. The score, the breakdown, and your settings stay on this device. To learn more, see the PRIVACY.md document shipped with the extension.
